title: cynoglossum erythraeum
intro: Cynoglossum erythraeum, also known as the Red Tongue, is a plant species that belongs to the borage family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Cynoglossum erythraeum can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
